summary.original: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
summary.zhCN: 实现任何功能或缺陷修复时，在编写实现代码之前使用。

description.original: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code. Agent-OPT preserves the fixed official bundle and adapts it for a dedicated bilingual SkillWorkspace workflow with ranked guidance, full-text search, and sandboxed supporting-file previews. Upstream scripts are never executed by this adapter.
description.zhCN: 实现任何功能或缺陷修复时，在编写实现代码之前使用。 Agent-OPT 保留固定版本的官方完整资源包，并将其适配为能力专属的双语 SkillWorkspace 工作流，支持相关章节排序、全文检索和沙箱化支持文件预览；此适配器绝不执行上游脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official OpenAI plugins repository at commit 11c74d6ba24d3a6d48f54a194cd00ef3beea18f9; Git blob SHA 7a751fa946b7fd801feb504cb1af6b5b62adcf43.
The parent superpowers plugin declares the MIT license in its fixed official repository LICENSE file; a local review copy is preserved with this skill bundle.

license.evidence: Primary-source MIT license evidence is preserved from plugins/superpowers/LICENSE. Agent-OPT redistributes the fixed text bundle for read-only bilingual Web rendering and does not execute upstream implementation scripts.

description.original: Translate one required behavior into a failing test, minimal passing implementation, clean refactor, and fresh regression evidence.
description.zhCN: 将一项所需行为转化为失败测试、最小通过实现、干净重构和最新回归证据。

description.original: Open the complete pinned skill document in Simplified Chinese or its original language.
description.zhCN: 以完整简体中文译文或原文打开固定版本的技能文档。

description.original: Run keyword search across the selected skill body and return line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在所选技能正文中执行关键词搜索，并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Inspect the heading outline and open one structured section at a time.
description.zhCN: 查看标题大纲，并一次打开一个结构化章节。

name.zhCN: 浏览固定版本支持资源

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, and templates captured from the fixed upstream skill directory; license evidence remains a separately reviewed manifest and local copy.
description.zhCN: 列出并安全预览固定上游技能目录中的文本参考、脚本和模板；许可证证据在 manifest 与本地审查副本中单独保留。

notes: The in-process adapter reads only curated files under catalog/skill-bodies/skill-test-driven-development.
Supporting-resource previews are limited to BUNDLE.json fixed-hash paths; traversal, unknown paths, symlinks, binaries, and oversized files are rejected.
No upstream scripts, Git commands, network calls, secrets, or external accounts are executed or accessed by this Web adaptation.
Selected from the official OpenAI superpowers plugin for broadly reusable, non-trivial Agent workflow guidance.

The complete Simplified Chinese SKILL.md preserves frontmatter name, heading hierarchy, fenced code blocks, inline-code tokens, Markdown destinations, and raw URLs; the focused structural validator passed.
Every tracked supporting file from the pinned skill directory is preserved and recorded with SHA-256 evidence in BUNDLE.json; the MIT license review copy is included separately.
The capability-specific Chinese Web profile is merged into the shared SkillWorkspace registry and passed its real Chromium task, bilingual source, supporting-resource and failure workflows.
Lifecycle remains web-ready: the read-only bilingual Web adapter is fully evidenced, while optional upstream commands and downstream implementation outcomes are not claimed as executed.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation reviewed against the pinned original; code blocks, commands, paths, inline tokens, links, URLs, and heading structure are preserved.

features: 待实现的行为 with two capability-specific examples
接口、边界情况与测试环境 bounded context input
TDD 实施循环包 in checklist, agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
fixed-commit supporting-resource browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
dedicatedElements: 接口、边界情况与测试环境 panel
TDD 实施循环包 result view
用 TDD 修复一个表单缺陷 example chip
为重试功能设计测试先行步骤 example chip

tests.evidence: skill-test-driven-development: pinned BUNDLE hashes and bilingual source, outline, search and asset runtime paths passed in the merged 50-Skill suite.
skill-test-driven-development: its dedicated Chinese profile executed skill_prepare with representative objective and context and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-test-driven-development: invalid locale, empty or oversized objective, unknown fields or sections, traversal and unknown supporting-resource paths were rejected.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-test-driven-development] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-test-driven-development; result=passed
skill-test-driven-development: bundle containment and fixed hashes passed; the adapter reads only curated files and grants no network, command, secret or external-account access.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
